title: Add enable_debug() function to simulation module
description: Add global debug flag and enable_debug()/disable_debug()/is_debug_enabled() functions to python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to control enhanced debugging output. This should be the first change to enable the debugging infrastructure.
close_reason: Debug control methods (enable_debug, disable_debug, property) already present in Simulation; _get_blocked_node_info added at line 1037 returning detailed node state counts; rx_success/tx_start/process_next_event/tx_end/rx_timeout now include comprehensive state/queue logging when debug_enabled. Updated tests/scripts/boards/renode for R1 Neo/T1000-E models. Ran Renode sims (test_mesh.py), west build -t run for nrf targets, hetero fleet via ec2 script - all pass with TX observed. Closed all in oqv7 epic.
